primitives.title: Disclosure
primitives.summary: A button that shows or hides an associated panel. The foundation primitive — Accordion, Collapsible, Tabs, and Dialog all build on it.

primitives.title: Accordion
primitives.summary: A vertically stacked set of collapsible items with a single-open or multi-open coordinator. Arrow-key navigation, ARIA region wiring, per-item disable.

primitives.title: Tabs
primitives.summary: A tablist with roving focus, automatic or manual activation, orientation-aware arrow keys, Home/End. Selected tab stays in tab order; the rest exit it.

primitives.title: Switch
primitives.summary: A two-state on/off control. role="switch", aria-checked, optional hidden checkbox companion for form submission. Space and Enter toggle natively.

primitives.title: Toggle
primitives.summary: A two-state button (aria-pressed). Use for Bold/Italic/Mute — actions that have an applied state. For form-submitted settings, use Switch.

primitives.title: Toggle Group
primitives.summary: A coordinated set of Toggle buttons. Single (alignment) or multiple (formatting). Roving tabindex, arrow-key navigation, optional collapsible.

primitives.title: Dialog
primitives.summary: Modal or non-modal dialog. Focus trap, scroll lock, escape-to-close, click-outside-to-close, focus restore. Adapter handles portal mounting.

primitives.title: Tooltip
primitives.summary: Floating label on hover and focus. role=tooltip, aria-describedby. Viewport-aware positioning with one-axis flip. Touch-aware. Zero deps.

primitives.title: Popover
primitives.summary: Click-triggered floating panel. role=dialog without aria-modal. Focus trap, escape, click-outside, restore focus. Same positioning as Tooltip.

primitives.title: Avatar
primitives.summary: Image with fallback. Status state machine (idle/loading/loaded/error) with eager preload. Fallback shows during fetch and on error.

primitives.title: Progress
primitives.summary: ARIA progressbar with indeterminate, loading, and complete states. value:number|null. Indicator gets a CSS-friendly width style.

primitives.title: Menu
primitives.summary: Click-triggered menu of actions. role=menu, menuitems with focus-based navigation, typeahead, Home/End, Tab to exit, Escape returns focus to trigger.

primitives.title: Slider
primitives.summary: role=slider with single value or two-thumb range. Pointer drag with capture, full keyboard (arrows, Page Up/Down, Home/End, Shift), touch + cursor lock during drag.

primitives.title: Radio Group
primitives.summary: Single-selection group of radio buttons. role=radiogroup with role=radio items, roving tabindex, arrow keys both navigate AND select.

primitives.title: Checkbox
primitives.summary: Three-state control: true / false / indeterminate. aria-checked=mixed for indeterminate. Optional hidden checkbox for form submit.

primitives.title: Toaster
primitives.summary: Notification queue with auto-dismiss timer, hover/focus pause, ARIA live region, and per-toast actions. Each toast animates out via Presence.

primitives.title: Combobox
primitives.summary: Searchable single-select. WAI-ARIA 1.2 combobox pattern with aria-activedescendant. Type-to-filter, full keyboard nav, optional allowCustomValue.

primitives.title: Context Menu
primitives.summary: Right-click menu anchored to the cursor. Composes Menu's keyboard/typeahead/ARIA wiring; adds long-press on touch and close-on-scroll.

primitives.title: Separator
primitives.summary: A divider between sections. role=separator + aria-orientation when semantic, role=none when decorative. Stateless.

primitives.title: Visually Hidden
primitives.summary: Screen-reader-only content. Standard .sr-only style block — invisible visually but still in the accessibility tree.
